name: Bureck
recipeIngredient: 1 pound pkg. Filo pastry, thawed, if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. In a 13x9-inch baking pan, layer 6 sheets of Filo with melted butter and a few drops of water to make the bottom crust.
3. Brown the beef and onion together.
4. Add the garlic salt, cumin, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Drain any excess fat from the meat mixture.
6. Place a layer of meat on the crust.
7. Repeat layers of meat and Filo until all the meat is used.
8. Top with at least 4 more sheets of Filo, sealing the edges.
9. Bake for 1 hour at 350°F, or until brown and crusty. If not fully browned, turn the oven to broiler briefly.
